mapper.select: SELECT tenant_id, sales_document_id, COUNT(*)::int AS item_count FROM dealer_sales_document_item WHERE del_flag = '0' AND tenant_id IN #{id} AND sales_document_id IN #{id} GROUP BY tenant_id, sales_document_id

SELECT item.tenant_id, item.sales_document_id, COUNT(*)::int AS item_count, COALESCE(SUM(item.quantity), 0)::int AS total_quantity, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(sent.dispatched_quantity, 0)), 0)::int AS dispatched_quantity, BOOL_AND(COALESCE(sent.dispatched_quantity, 0) = COALESCE(item.quantity, 0)) AS all_dispatched FROM dealer_sales_document_item item LEFT JOIN ( SELECT shipment_item.tenant_id, shipment_item.sales_document_id, shipment_item.sales_item_id, SUM(shipment_item.quantity)::int AS dispatched_quantity FROM dealer_shipment_item shipment_item INNER JOIN dealer_shipment shipment ON shipment.shipment_id = shipment_item.shipment_id AND shipment.tenant_id = shipment_item.tenant_id AND shipment.del_flag = '0' AND shipment.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'CANCELLED') WHERE shipment_item.tenant_id IN #{id} AND shipment_item.sales_document_id IN #{id} GROUP BY shipment_item.tenant_id, shipment_item.sales_document_id, shipment_item.sales_item_id ) sent ON sent.tenant_id = item.tenant_id AND sent.sales_document_id = item.sales_document_id AND sent.sales_item_id = item.sales_item_id WHERE item.del_flag = '0' AND item.tenant_id IN #{id} AND item.sales_document_id IN #{id} GROUP BY item.tenant_id, item.sales_document_id
